Items.Title: Germany star’s World Cup in tatters amid fears he will miss rest of tournament after injury against Ivory Coast
Items.Description:
GERMANY star Nico Schlotterbeck could be sidelined for the rest of the World Cup after suffering an injury against Ivory Coast.

Items.Title: Manuel Neuer Wears Special 'Legacy' and 'Golden Gloves' Patches at 2026 World Cup
Items.Description: Following Luka Modrić and Lionel Messi, Manuel Neuer became the next player to wear two special patches when he appeared in Germany's second group-stage match against Ivory Coast.

Items.Title: From factory floor to World Cup star - Germany's super-sub Undav
Items.Description: It was not long ago that his manager Julian Nagelsmann called him out openly - but Deniz Undav is proving himself a key player for Germany at the World Cup.
